t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID -- platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Mapped from Dim_Customer.RealCID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Group Customer ID -- cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Original customer ID from the source provider. Together with OriginalProviderID, enables tracing of migrated accounts. Default=0.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Original customer ID from the source provider. Together with OriginalProviderID, enables tracing of migrated accounts. Default=0.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI. Dim-lookup from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via PlayerLevelID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Affiliate (partner) ID under which the customer was acquired (renamed from SerialID). FK to BackOffice.Affiliate. NULL for direct/organic registrations.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Affiliate (partner) ID under which the customer was acquired (renamed from AffiliateID in Dim_Customer). FK to BackOffice.Affiliate. NULL for direct/organic registrations.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Rename direction adapted for CIDFirstDates context (correct but not verbatim)

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Brand name displayed in BackOffice interfaces, reports, and internal systems. Multiple LabelIDs can share the same Name (e.g., 0, 1, 9 all = 'eToro').
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Brand name displayed in BackOffice interfaces, reports, and internal systems. Multiple LabelIDs can share the same Name (e.g., 0, 1, 9 all = 'eToro'). Dim-lookup from Dim_Label.Name via LabelID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Full country name in English. Dim-lookup from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped 'Unique per row' and all usage context (UI dropdowns, compliance documents, analytical reports)

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Language display name. UNIQUE constraint. Used in back-office language selectors and reporting.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Platform language display name. Dim-lookup from Dim_Language.Name via LanguageID. Fixed-width char(500) -- trailing spaces expected.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped UNIQUE constraint and usage context; paraphrased 'Language display name' to 'Platform language display name'

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Marketing region label for this country. Loaded from etoro.Dictionary.MarketingRegion.Name via JOIN on MarketingRegionID. NOT the geographic region from Dictionary.Region. 22 distinct values (e.g., 'ROW', 'Africa', 'French', 'Arabic Other'). Used for marketing campaign grouping.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Marketing region label for this country. Loaded from etoro.Dictionary.MarketingRegion.Name via JOIN on MarketingRegionID. NOT the geographic region from Dictionary.Region. Dim-lookup from Dim_Country.Region via CountryID.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped '22 distinct values' examples and 'Used for marketing campaign grouping'

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Sales/support desk assignment for this country. Loaded from Ext_Dim_Country_Region_Desk via MarketingRegionID join. Examples: 'ROW', 'Other EU', 'Arabic', 'USA'. NULL if no desk mapping for this marketing region.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Sales/support desk assignment for this country. From Dim_Country.Desk via CountryID. Examples: 'ROW', 'Other EU', 'Arabic', 'USA'. NULL if no desk mapping.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer email address. Unique (case-insensitive via LowerEmail computed column). Email changes trigger Customer.LastChanges update via trigger.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer email address. Unique (case-insensitive via LowerEmail computed column). Email changes trigger Customer.LastChanges update via trigger. Dynamically masked with default().

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Unique human-readable label for the funnel. Used in marketing reports, BackOffice customer views, and attribution analytics. Describes the campaign/channel/product that drove registration.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Registration funnel name. Dim-lookup from Dim_Funnel.Name via FunnelID. Tracks which user journey/funnel variant the customer came through.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Complete rewrite. Lost 'Unique', 'marketing reports, BackOffice customer views, attribution analytics', 'campaign/channel/product'

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Unique human-readable label for the funnel. Used in marketing reports, BackOffice customer views, and attribution analytics. Describes the campaign/channel/product that drove registration.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Source funnel variant name. Dim-lookup from Dim_Funnel.Name via FunnelFromID.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Extreme abbreviation — all upstream content dropped

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Platform download source ID. Legacy tracking for which platform installer the customer used.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Platform download source ID. Legacy tracking for which platform installer the customer used.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Advertising banner ID that led to registration. Legacy acquisition tracking.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Advertising banner ID that led to registration. Legacy acquisition tracking.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Sub-affiliate identifier string. Can be up to 1024 chars for complex affiliate tracking paths.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Sub-affiliate identifier string. Can be up to 1024 chars for complex affiliate tracking paths. Mapped from Dim_Customer.SubSerialID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Referral CID - the customer who referred this customer (for RAF program tracking).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Referral CID -- the customer who referred this customer (for RAF program tracking).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Verification tier identifier. 0=Unverified (registration default, severe restrictions), 1=Basic (limited trading), 2=Intermediate (POI submitted, moderate access), 3=Full KYC (all features unlocked). -1=DWH sentinel.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: KYC verification level ID. 0=Unverified, 1=Basic, 2=Intermediate, 3=Full KYC. Dim-lookup from Dim_VerificationLevel.ID via VerificationLevelID.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped per-level descriptions (severe restrictions, limited trading, moderate access, all features unlocked)

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Gender: M, F, or U (Unknown). CHECK constraint CCST_GENDER enforces these three values only. Used in LinkedAccountHash1.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Gender: M, F, or U (Unknown). CHECK constraint enforces these three values only.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped constraint name CCST_GENDER and LinkedAccountHash1 reference

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer date of birth. Used in LinkedAccountHash1 for duplicate detection and in KYC age verification.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer date of birth. Used in LinkedAccountHash1 for duplicate detection and in KYC age verification.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Language for customer communications (emails, notifications). May differ from LanguageID if customer has different communication preferences.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Language for customer communications (emails, notifications). Dim-lookup from Dim_Language.Name via CommunicationLanguageID. May differ from Language (UI language).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Reworded 'May differ from LanguageID' to 'May differ from Language (UI language)'

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Regulatory entity governing this account. FK to Dictionary.Regulation. Top values: CySEC=7.39M, BVI=7.30M, FCA=1.17M. Changes trigger RegulationChangeDate update.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Regulatory entity governing this account. FK to Dictionary.Regulation. Top values: CySEC, BVI, FCA.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped specific distribution counts and RegulationChangeDate trigger info

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Secondary/override regulation for accounts subject to multiple jurisdictions. FK to Dictionary.Regulation.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Secondary/override regulation for accounts subject to multiple jurisdictions. FK to Dictionary.Regulation.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Version of the privacy policy the customer has accepted. FK to Dictionary.PrivacyPolicy.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Version of the privacy policy the customer has accepted. FK to Dictionary.PrivacyPolicy.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Registration IP address.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Registration IP address as numeric value. Dynamically masked with default().
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added type context (bigint vs varchar in source) and masking info

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full human-readable geographic name of the region — state, province, or territory. Sourced from Dictionary.RegionName.Name. Examples: 'California', 'New York', 'Ontario'.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Full human-readable geographic name of the region -- state, province, or territory. Sourced from Dictionary.RegionName.Name. Dim-lookup from Dim_State_and_Province.Name via Dim_Customer.RegionID = RegionByIP_ID. NULL if region not in the 181-row Dim_State_and_Province table.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Manual override name for the marketing region, from Ext_Dim_Country. May differ from Region (e.g., Albania: Region=ROE, MarketingRegionManualName=CEE). Used when the automated MarketingRegion label needs a business-friendly correction.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Manual override name for the marketing region. From Dim_Country.MarketingRegionManualName via CountryID. May differ from Region (e.g., Albania: Region=ROE, NewMarketingRegion=CEE).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Electronic verification match result. Score or decision from automated identity verification vendors (Onfido, Au10tix). NULL if not yet processed.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Electronic verification match result. Score or decision from automated identity verification vendors (Onfido, Au10tix). NULL if not yet processed.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: (V_Liabilities: Direct passthrough from Fact_SnapshotEquity.Credit — no quotable upstream description)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer credit balance (promotional/bonus credit). Daily snapshot from V_Liabilities.Credit. Updated only for yesterday's run date.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: (V_Liabilities: Direct passthrough from Fact_SnapshotEquity.RealizedEquity — no quotable upstream description)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer realized equity (total account value excluding unrealized PnL). Daily snapshot from V_Liabilities.RealizedEquity. Updated only for yesterday's run date.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: N/A — should be Tier 2, not Tier 1
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1 if the customer meets ALL four funded criteria on this date... Source: Function_Population_Funded.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Wrong tier: ETL-computed membership test in TVF result set, not a passthrough. Should be Tier 2.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: N/A — should be Tier 2, not Tier 1
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Permanent graduation date -- the LATEST of the three funded milestones. Computed as GREATEST(FTDDateID, FirstVerifiedDateID, LEAST(...)). Source: Function_Population_First_Time_Funded.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Wrong tier: arithmetic GREATEST/LEAST computation, not a passthrough. Should be Tier 2.

issues.problem: Tier 1 description completely paraphrased. Upstream Dim_Funnel.Name says 'Unique human-readable label for the funnel. Used in marketing reports, BackOffice customer views, and attribution analytics.' Wiki says 'Registration funnel name. Tracks which user journey/funnel variant the customer came through.' All upstream specifics lost.
Tier 1 description reduced to a single generic sentence ('Source funnel variant name'). Same upstream source as FunnelName but all content dropped.

Tagged Tier 1 from Function_Population_Funded but is ETL-computed: SP does UPDATE SET IsFundedNew = 1 WHERE CID IN (SELECT RealCID FROM Function_Population_Funded(@dateINT)), else 0. This is a membership test / CASE expression, not a passthrough. Should be Tier 2.

Tagged Tier 1 from Function_Population_First_Time_Funded but the wiki itself describes it as 'Computed as GREATEST(FTDDateID, FirstVerifiedDateID, LEAST(FirstTradeDateID, FirstIOBDateID, FirstOptionsTradeDateID))'. Arithmetic computation = Tier 2, not Tier 1.

Country dropped 'Unique per row' and all usage context. Language dropped 'UNIQUE constraint' and 'Used in back-office language selectors and reporting.' Both are dim-lookup passthroughs where the upstream wiki text was available and should have been quoted verbatim.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) FunnelName: use upstream verbatim 'Unique human-readable label for the funnel. Used in marketing reports, BackOffice customer views, and attribution analytics. Describes the campaign/channel/product that drove registration.' + dim-lookup context. (2) FunnelFromName: same upstream text as FunnelName, adapted for FunnelFromID. (3) Re-tag IsFundedNew as Tier 2 — SP_CIDFirstDates (ETL-computed membership test). (4) Re-tag FirstNewFundedDate as Tier 2 — SP_CIDFirstDates (GREATEST/LEAST arithmetic). (5) Country: restore 'Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports.' (6) Language: restore 'UNIQUE constraint. Used in back-office language selectors and reporting.' (7) Update footer tier counts to 25 T1, 70 T2.

skipped_phases: P2/P3 status unclear — footer says 12/14 but no explicit phase gate checklist
